SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class DebottleneckingAdvisor.Recommendation

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.DebottleneckingAdvisor.Recommendation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DebottleneckingAdvisor
public static class DebottleneckingAdvisor.Recommendation extends Object implements Serializable
A ranked recommendation for one candidate upgrade.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final double
    benefitCostRatio
    Benefit-cost ratio (present value of benefits divided by capex).
    private final DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate
    candidate
    The candidate the recommendation refers to.
    private final double
    npvNok
    Net present value of the upgrade in the configured currency.
    private final double
    paybackYears
    Simple payback in years, or Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY if never paid back.
    private final double
    pvBenefitsNok
    Present value of the benefits in the configured currency.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization version identifier.

  • Constructor Details

    • Recommendation

      public Recommendation(DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate candidate, double npvNok, double pvBenefitsNok, double benefitCostRatio, double paybackYears)
      Creates a recommendation.
      Parameters:
      candidate - the candidate the recommendation refers to
      npvNok - net present value in the configured currency
      pvBenefitsNok - present value of benefits in the configured currency
      benefitCostRatio - benefit-cost ratio
      paybackYears - simple payback in years

    • getCandidate

      public DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate getCandidate()
      Gets the candidate this recommendation refers to.

      the candidate

      public double getNpvNok()
      Gets the net present value of the upgrade.

      public double getPvBenefitsNok()
      Gets the present value of the benefits.

      present value of benefits in the configured currency

    • getBenefitCostRatio

      public double getBenefitCostRatio()
      Gets the benefit-cost ratio.
      Returns:
      benefit-cost ratio

    • getPaybackYears

      public double getPaybackYears()
      Gets the simple payback in years.
      Returns:
      payback in years, or positive infinity if never paid back

    • isAttractive

      public boolean isAttractive()
      Indicates whether the upgrade is economically attractive (positive NPV).
      Returns:
      true if the net present value is positive
